packages.name: git

packages.name: repo-manager
packages.description: Read, write, list, and patch files in the workspace

packages.description: Search the codebase by content pattern or file name
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: shell
packages.description: Execute shell commands in the workspace
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: content
packages.description: Content creation and editing with search
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: software
packages.description: Code generation with repo, shell and search tools

packages.name: software-full
packages.description: Software development (full pipeline with QA review)
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: linear
packages.description: Triggers pipelines from Linear webhook events and syncs issue status on pipeline completion or failure
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: slack
packages.description: Sends Slack notifications to a configured channel when pipeline events occur, such as completion or failure
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: webhook
packages.description: Sends generic HTTP webhook notifications for pipeline and stage lifecycle events including start, completion, and failure
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: analyst
packages.description: Senior software analyst — reads code, analyzes requests, produces implementation plans
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: coder
packages.description: Expert software developer agent — implements changes using repo-manager, shell, and search tools
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: publisher
packages.description: Git workflow specialist — creates branch, commits, pushes, and opens PR/MR
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: reviewer
packages.description: Strict QA engineer — verifies implementation against acceptance criteria, returns approved or rejected
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: writer
packages.description: Expert content writer — researches topics and creates high-quality structured content
packages.author: studio-core

packages.name: code-conventions

packages.name: git-workflow
